contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with our team for personalized assistance and expert advice. We're here to help you achieve your financial goals.
contact.messageSentDesc: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.

faqItems.question: How quickly can I get approved?
faqItems.answer: Most applications are approved within 24 hours. We offer same-day pre-approval for qualified customers.

faqItems.question: What credit score do I need?
faqItems.answer: We work with all credit types. Even with less-than-perfect credit, we can often find a solution that works for you.

faqItems.question: Are there any hidden fees?
faqItems.answer: No hidden fees. We believe in transparent pricing and will clearly explain all costs upfront.

faqItems.question: Can I refinance my existing loan?
faqItems.answer: Yes! We offer competitive refinancing options that can help lower your monthly payment or interest rate.

faqItems.question: Why might my current vehicle coverage not actually protect me?
faqItems.answer: Since the post-COVID chip shortage, many dealerships reduced their stock and stopped properly certifying vehicles. If your vehicle isn't on the dealer's paperwork, your certified coverage through a third-party provider may not actually apply. We'll review your situation and make sure you have real, verified protection.

footer.description: Your trusted partner in automotive financing for over a decade. We're dedicated to providing unparalleled service and expertise to our clients nationwide.

autoLoanEstimate.disclaimer: The preapproval goals mentioned are targets based on our experience working with similar customers and are not a guarantee of specific outcomes. Actual results will vary depending on individual circumstances, credit profiles, and lender decisions. These goals are not a promise or commitment from lenders, and our role is to facilitate the refinancing process. We're committed to helping you explore options and potential savings tailored to your situation. Nothing in this document speaks for the lenders, these are just goals. We move forward with all customers because we believe our process provides value and support, helping you in multiple ways regardless of the refinancing outcome.

hero.title: Refinance Benefits
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive coverage benefits that provide peace of mind on the road

intro.title: Drive with Confidence
intro.description: Your vehicle can be unpredictable - and so can the coverage you think you have. Since the post-COVID chip shortage, many dealerships reduced their stock and stopped properly certifying vehicles. That means thousands of drivers are paying for certified coverage through third-party providers without their vehicle actually being on the dealer's paperwork. Drive Point Exchange helps you understand what you're really covered for and provides true, verified protection that picks up where your manufacturer warranty leaves off.

section.title: Comprehensive Coverage Benefits
section.subtitle: Complete protection for every aspect of your vehicle ownership

benefits.title: Roadside Assistance
benefits.description: 24/7 protection with comprehensive roadside assistance coverage.

benefits.title: Road Hazard Coverage
benefits.description: Protection for tire damage from road hazards with generous reimbursement limits.

benefits.title: Rental Car Reimbursement
benefits.description: Get back on the road quickly with rental car coverage during repairs.

benefits.title: Trip Interruption
benefits.description: Added protection for overnight stays when stranded far from home.

benefits.title: Maintenance Benefits
benefits.description: Keep your vehicle in top condition with comprehensive maintenance coverage.

benefits.title: Extended Protection
benefits.description: True coverage that fills the gaps left by recent dealership certification changes - verified protection that extends well beyond your manufacturer warranty.

cta.title: Ready to Protect Your Investment?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust Drive Point Exchange for their vehicle coverage needs.

hero.title: About Drive Point Exchange
hero.subtitle: Your trusted partner in automotive financing for over a decade. We're dedicated to providing unparalleled service and expertise to our clients nationwide.

about.featured: As featured in leading financial publications

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide accessible, transparent, and competitive auto financing solutions that help individuals and businesses achieve their transportation goals while building lasting relationships based on trust and exceptional service.
mission.description2: We are dedicated to providing unparalleled service and expertise to our clients nationwide. Our team of experienced professionals works tirelessly to understand your unique financial needs and tailor solutions that exceed your expectations.

story.title: Our Story
story.subtitle: Leading the way in automotive financial solutions since 2012
story.paragraph1: Founded in 2012, Drive Point Exchange began with a simple vision: to make auto financing accessible and transparent for everyone. What started as a small team of finance professionals has grown into a trusted name in the automotive lending industry.
story.paragraph2: We recognized that traditional lending institutions often made the financing process complicated and intimidating. Our founders set out to change that by creating a customer-first approach that prioritizes clarity, competitive rates, and exceptional service.
story.paragraph3: Today, we've helped thousands of customers secure financing for their dream vehicles, from first-time buyers to seasoned car enthusiasts. Our commitment to innovation and customer satisfaction continues to drive our growth and success.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear, honest communication with no hidden fees or surprises. We believe in complete transparency throughout the entire process.

speed.title: Speed
speed.description: Fast approvals and quick processing to get you on the road sooner. Our streamlined processes ensure you don't wait unnecessarily.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.description: We work with you to find the best solution for your unique situation. Your success is our success, and we're committed to your financial well-being.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: Commitment to the highest standards in everything we do. We continuously improve our services to exceed your expectations.

team.title: Meet Our Team
team.subtitle: Experienced professionals dedicated to your success

michael.title: CEO & Founder
michael.description: 15+ years in automotive finance, passionate about customer success and financial empowerment.

sarah.title: VP of Operations
sarah.description: Expert in loan processing and customer relationship management with a focus on operational excellence.

david.title: Head of Technology
david.description: Leading our digital transformation and customer experience initiatives to make financing more accessible.

hero.title: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our services.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: When you interact with Drive Point Exchange, we may collect the following types of information: Personal Information (Name, email address, phone number, mailing address, and other contact details), Financial Information (Loan details, vehicle information, credit score if applicable, and refinancing preferences), and Technical Data (IP address, browser type, device information, and website usage data collected through cookies and analytics tools).

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your information to: Process and evaluate your auto refinancing application; Provide customer support and respond to inquiries; Improve our website, services, and customer experience; Send updates, offers, and promotional materials (you may opt out at any time); Comply with legal and regulatory requirements.

sections.title: Information Sharing & Disclosure
sections.content: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. However, we may share your data with: Lenders and Financial Institutions to process your auto refinancing request; Service Providers (third-party vendors who assist with business operations, such as payment processing and marketing); Legal & Regulatory Authorities if required by law or to protect our rights and prevent fraud. All the above categories exclude text messaging originator opt-in data and consent; this information will not be shared with any third parties.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal and financial information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. However, no online transmission is 100% secure, and we encourage users to protect their credentials.

sections.title: Your Rights & Choices
sections.content: You have the right to: Access, update, or correct your personal information; Request deletion of your data (subject to legal retention requirements); Opt out of marketing communications at any time. To exercise your rights, please contact us.

sections.title: Cookies & Tracking Technologies
sections.content: Our website may use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance user experience and analyze website traffic. You can manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.content: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices and encourage you to review their policies before sharing your information.

sections.title: Updates to This Privacy Policy
sections.content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.subtitle: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:
